2603.17324.title: ShuttleEnv: An Interactive Data-Driven RL Environment for Badminton Strategy Modeling
2603.17324.paper_summary: We present ShuttleEnv, an interactive and data-driven simulation environment for badminton, designed to support reinforcement learning and strategic behavior analysis in fast-paced adversarial sports. The environment is grounded in elite-player match data and employs explicit probabilistic models to simulate rally-level dynamics, enabling realistic and interpretable agent-opponent interactions without relying on physics-based simulation. In this demonstration, we showcase multiple trained agents within ShuttleEnv and provide live, step-by-step visualization of badminton rallies, allowing attendees to explore different play styles, observe emergent strategies, and interactively analyze decision-making behaviors. ShuttleEnv serves as a reusable platform for research, visualization, and demonstration of intelligent agents in sports AI. Our ShuttleEnv demo video URL: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1hTR4P16U27H2O0-w316bR73pxE2ucczX/view
2603.17324.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 ShuttleEnv，一個互動式和數據驅動的羽毛球模擬環境，旨在支持強化學習和快速對抗性運動中的戰略行為分析。該環境基於精英選手的比賽數據，並採用明確的概率模型來模擬回合層級的動態，實現現實且可解釋的代理-對手互動，而無需依賴基於物理的模擬。在這次演示中，我們展示了 ShuttleEnv 中的多個訓練代理，並提供羽毛球回合的即時逐步可視化，讓參與者探索不同的打球風格，觀察新興的戰略，並互動分析決策行為。ShuttleEnv 作為一個可重用的平台，用於研究、可視化和展示運動 AI 中的智能代理。我們的 ShuttleEnv 演示視頻網址： https://drive.google.com/file/d/1hTR4P16U27H2O0-w316bR73pxE2ucczX/view
2603.17324.author: Ang Li et.al.
2603.17324.authors: Ang Li, Xinyang Gong, Bozhou Chen, Yunlong Lu, Jiaming Ji, Yongyi Wang, Yaodong Yang, Wenxin Li
